title: 50 Pack Black Bin Bags, 100L, 33 Microns, Leak-Resistant, Eco-Friendly, Strong & Durable Recyclable Refuse Sacks, Bin Liners for Home, Office & Kitchen Waste Disposal
features: GENEROUS 100L CAPACITY: This pack includes 50 extra-strong kitchen bin bags, each measuring 736 x 990 mm. made from recyclable and biodegradable materials, these large, durable refuse sacks bags are suitable for bins ranging from 50l to 100l. they are designed to handle waste without tearing or splitting—perfect for both household and commercial use.

LEAK-RESISTANT: These black bin bags are specially designed to prevent leaks and spills, making them ideal for wet or heavy waste. this bin liners help keep your bins and floors clean, tidy, and free from messy accidents.

KEEP IT CLEAN & ODOR-FREE: Designed for large outdoor trash cans, these 100L heavy duty bin bags protect against dirt, liquids, odors, and maggots. this large black bags help maintain hygiene by preventing leaks and keeping your bins clean and odor-free.

ECO FRIENDLY: Crafted from 98% recycled plastic, our plastic bags are an excellent choice for environmentally conscious consumers. Make a positive impact on the environment without compromising on performance. Fully recyclable after use, they support responsible disposal and help reduce your carbon footprint.

MULTI-PURPOSE: These bin bags heavy duty are suitable for use throughout your home or workplace—from the kitchen and bathroom to the office and outdoor spaces. They’re also great for pet waste, car trash, and many other everyday needs, offering convenience wherever you use them.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Unroll the Bag Pull a fresh black bin bag from the roll, ready for use. Tear Along Perforation Gently tear the bin liners at the perforated line for a clean, easy separation. Fit Bag Into the Bin Place the bag inside the bin and fold the edges over the rim for a secure fit. Tie & Dispose Waste Once full, tie the bag tightly and remove it for clean, leak-free disposal. Perfect-Fit Bin Liners for Modern Home Bins Strong black bin liners that fit neatly inside household bins, providing a clean, secure, and leak-resistant solution for everyday waste. Designed to stay hidden and tight around the rim, these liners keep your home tidy while delivering reliable strength and durability. Perfect for Every Space These durable black bin bags are suitable for kitchens, offices, gardens, warehouses, and medical environments—versatile for all waste disposal needs. Heavy-Duty Outdoor Waste Protection Large, bin bags heavy duty handle outdoor waste effortlessly, preventing leaks and keeping yards, driveways, and bins clean and organised.
